19.kj: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore),

19.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
19.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

19.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
19.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

19.gl: properly, to plump, i.e. fill up hollows; by implication, to cover (for clothing or secrecy)
19.kj: clad self, close, clothe, conceal, cover (self), (flee to) hide, overwhelm. Compare H3780 (כָּשָׂה).

19.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
19.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
19.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

19.gl: to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently
19.kj: exceed, confirm, be great, be mighty, prevail, put to more (strength), strengthen, be stronger, be valiant.

20.gl: properly, a mother (i.e. unit of measure, or the fore-arm (below the elbow), i.e. a cubit; also a door-base (as a bond of the entrance)
20.kj: cubit, [phrase] hundred (by exchange for H3967 (מֵאָה)), measure, post.
(eigh-, fif-, four-, nine-, seven-, six-, thir-) teen(-th), [phrase] eleven(-th), [phrase] sixscore thousand, [phrase] twelve(-th).

20.gl: properly, to plump, i.e. fill up hollows; by implication, to cover (for clothing or secrecy)
20.kj: clad self, close, clothe, conceal, cover (self), (flee to) hide, overwhelm. Compare H3780 (כָּשָׂה).

20.gl: properly, the upper part, used only adverbially with prefix upward, above, overhead, from the top, etc.
20.kj: above, exceeding(-ly), forward, on ([idiom] very) high, over, up(-on, -ward), very.

20.gl: to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently
20.kj: exceed, confirm, be great, be mighty, prevail, put to more (strength), strengthen, be stronger, be valiant.

20.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
20.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

21.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
21.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

21.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
21.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.

21.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
21.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

21.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
21.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
21.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

21.gl: properly, a dumb beast; especially any large quadruped or animal (often collective)
21.dv: from an unused root (probably meaning to be mute);

21.gl: a bird (as covered with feathers, or rather as covering with wings), often collectively

22.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
22.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

22.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
22.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

22.gl: to die (literally or figuratively); causatively, to kill
22.kj: [idiom] at all, [idiom] crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), [idiom] must needs, sla

22.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
22.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

22.gl: a puff, i.e. wind, angry or vital breath, divine inspiration, intellect. or (concretely) an animal

23.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
23.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
23.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

23.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)

23.gl: properly, to stroke or rub; by implication, to erase; also to smooth (as if with oil), i.e. grease or make fat; also to touch, i.e. reach to
23.kj: abolish, blot out, destroy, full of marrow, put out, reach unto, [idiom] utterly, wipe (away, out).

23.gl: a particle of affirmation, surely; hence (by limitation) only
23.kj: also, in any wise, at least, but, certainly, even, howbeit, nevertheless, notwithstanding, only, save, surely, of a surety, truly, verily, [phrase] wherefore, yet (but).

23.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.
